Woodland.name: The Weeping Willow
Woodland.description: A massive tree whose silver leaves hum with a faint, mournful melody.

Woodland.name: Hunter's Pitfall
Woodland.description: A camouflaged hole in the ground. Someone was trapping more than just rabbits here.

Woodland.name: The Shattered Carriage
Woodland.description: A noble's transport, overturned and picked clean, except for a single locked box.

Woodland.name: Gallows Hill
Woodland.description: Three empty nooses sway in the breeze. The grass here is burnt black.

Woodland.name: The Druid's Circle
Woodland.description: Twelve mossy stones arranged in a perfect circle. The air feels heavy with static.

Woodland.name: Bandit's Lookout
Woodland.description: A tall pine with iron spikes driven into the trunk like a ladder.

Woodland.name: The Honey-Bear's Den
Woodland.description: Smells sweet, but the bones outside suggest the owner isn't sharing.

Woodland.name: Fairy Ring
Woodland.description: A circle of glowing blue mushrooms. Step inside at your own risk.

Woodland.name: The Hermit's Grave
Woodland.description: A simple wooden cross. Fresh flowers are laid here every morning.

Woodland.name: Statue of the Forgotten King
Woodland.description: A moss-covered stone titan holding a broken sword.

Swamp.name: The Bog-Witch's Cauldron
Swamp.description: An iron pot bubbling over a fire that never goes out.

Swamp.name: Sinking Spires
Swamp.description: The tops of a buried cathedral poking through the mud.

Swamp.name: The Leech-Pool
Swamp.description: The water is black and moves even when there's no wind.

Swamp.name: Will-o'-the-Wisp Lantern
Swamp.description: A rusted cage hanging from a dead branch, glowing with cold fire.

Swamp.name: The Corpse-Flower Patch
Swamp.description: Huge, red blooms that smell of rotting meat.

Swamp.name: Old Pete's Ferry
Swamp.description: A half-sunken raft tied to a rotting pier.

Swamp.name: The Whispering Reeds
Swamp.description: If you stand still, the wind through the grass sounds like voices.

Swamp.name: Sunken Statues
Swamp.description: Faces of stone staring up from beneath the murky water.

Swamp.name: The Alchemist's Wreck
Swamp.description: A rowboat filled with cracked glass vials and purple stains.

Swamp.name: Bog-Iron Vein
Swamp.description: Reddish mud where the earth itself seems to be bleeding.

Mountain.name: The Eagle's Eyrie
Mountain.description: A precarious ledge with a view that stretches to the coast.

Mountain.name: The Frozen Miner
Mountain.description: A man turned to ice, still clutching a pickaxe made of silver.

Mountain.name: Wyvern's Perch
Mountain.description: A scorched rock smelling of sulfur and old meat.

Mountain.name: The Echoing Chasm
Mountain.description: A crack in the world. If you drop a stone, you never hear it hit.

Mountain.name: Star-Touch Peak
Mountain.description: The highest point, where the air is thin and the stars feel close.

Mountain.name: The Ancient Aqueduct
Mountain.description: Stone arches bridging two peaks, still carrying crystal-clear water.

Mountain.name: Hermit's Cave
Mountain.description: Hidden behind a waterfall of melting ice.

Mountain.name: The Giant's Staircase
Mountain.description: Steps carved into the cliffside, each five feet high.

Mountain.name: Obsidian Outcrop
Mountain.description: Volcanic glass that glitters like a black diamond.

Mountain.name: The Wind-Whistle Hole
Mountain.description: A natural tunnel that screams when the gale blows.

Path.name: The Traveler's Rest
Path.description: A stone bench with a carved map of the region.

Path.name: Broken Milestone
Path.description: The distance to 'Safety' has been scratched out.

Path.name: The Wayside Shrine
Path.description: A small altar to the God of Roads. Travelers leave copper coins here.

Path.name: Toll-Gate Ruins
Path.description: The rusted gate is locked, but the wall is long gone.

Path.name: The Old Well
Path.description: The bucket is gone, but something glitters at the bottom.

Path.name: Abandoned Watchtower
Path.description: The roof has collapsed, but the basement door is still bolted.

Path.name: The Merchant's Grave
Path.description: A pile of stones and a broken wagon wheel.

Path.name: Hanging Signboard
Path.description: It used to say 'Welcome', but now it's just a blank piece of wood.

Path.name: The Crossroads Oak
Path.description: Hundreds of ribbons are tied to its lower branches.

Path.name: Crumbling Bridge
Path.description: Spans a dry creek bed. The stonework is ancient dwarf-craft.
